note: Candidate products the autonomous factory loop builds to CODE-COMPLETE (doorstep), one per run, in priority order. Founder gates (deploy/keys/money/publish) are never crossed autonomously. The loop may also append new candidates it generates, honoring each factory's guardrail.

candidates.name: Invoice Aging Snapshot
candidates.what_it_is: Upload an AR/invoice CSV -> a clean 30/60/90 aging report + who-owes-what summary as XLSX + one-page PDF. Organizational tooling only.
candidates.buyer: Freelancers and small shops chasing unpaid invoices without accounting software.
candidates.guardrail: organizational tooling only; no financial/collections advice

candidates.name: Link & QR Safety Report
candidates.what_it_is: Paste a URL or upload a QR image -> an offline heuristic safety report (redirect chain, punycode/homoglyph, known-bad patterns, TLS surface). Clearly labeled heuristic, not a guarantee.
candidates.buyer: Cautious consumers and small-biz owners vetting a link before clicking.
candidates.guardrail: heuristic only; never claim certainty; no real-world security decision advice

candidates.name: Compliance Change Digest
candidates.what_it_is: Given provided regulatory/source docs -> a cited plain-English digest of what changed, who it affects, and an explicit uncertainty section. Citation-per-claim enforced.
candidates.buyer: Small compliance/ops teams tracking rule changes without a research staff.
candidates.guardrail: information not legal advice; every claim cited; uncertainty section mandatory
candidates.tests: 11 engine (citation linter) + 10 buyloop, all pass (node v22)

candidates.name: Podcast Intro & Transition Sting Pack
candidates.what_it_is: Themed packs of short instrumental stings/transitions with an attached usage license. License-gated delivery. Founder supplies cleared audio.
candidates.buyer: Independent podcasters needing cheap, license-clean audio furniture.
candidates.guardrail: instrumental-only; no vocals/voice-likeness; license-gate mandatory; no fabricated audio

candidates.name: Coloring Book Export
candidates.what_it_is: Turn an in-browser created story into a printable line-art coloring PDF; pay to export watermark-free. Child-safe.
candidates.buyer: Parents and teachers wanting a printable activity from a story.
candidates.guardrail: child-facing -> safe content; watermark-free only after purchase

candidates.name: Recurring Charge Finder
candidates.what_it_is: Upload a bank/card transaction CSV -> every charge that repeats, with cadence (weekly..annual), typical amount, price drift, dormancy, and annualized cost, as an XLSX workbook + one-page PDF. Organizational tooling only.
candidates.buyer: Solo operators and households who want to see every repeating charge in one place without connecting a bank account.
candidates.guardrail: organizational tooling only; no financial/tax/legal advice; never tells the user what to cancel
candidates.generated_by: autonomous factory loop 2026-07-18 (all prior candidates already BUILT)

candidates.name: Email Header Audit
candidates.what_it_is: Paste an email's raw header block -> an offline heuristic audit: the real sender behind the display name, authentication outcomes as REPORTED by a server (never re-verified), Reply-To/Return-Path/Message-ID/DKIM alignment, lookalike and punycode sending domains, and the full Received delivery path. Free preview shows signal counts; the $5 unlock shows every signal with its benign explanation.
candidates.buyer: People who get a suspicious-looking email and want to read what the headers actually say without installing anything or sending the message to a third party.
candidates.guardrail: heuristic only; never claim certainty; no real-world security decision advice (enforced by a fail-closed report linter)
candidates.generated_by: autonomous factory loop 2026-07-19 (all prior candidates already BUILT)

candidates.name: Client Revenue Concentration Report
candidates.what_it_is: Upload an invoice CSV -> how revenue is distributed across clients: per-client net and share, top 1/3/5/10 share, HHI on the 0-10,000 scale, effective client count, how few clients make up the first 50%/80%, monthly revenue series, per-client dormancy against that client’s own median gap, payment timing when a paid-date column exists, and disclosed multi-spelling merges. 5-sheet XLSX + one-page PDF. Organizational tooling only.
candidates.buyer: Freelancers, agencies and solo consultants who want to see how dependent their revenue actually is on a handful of clients, without connecting anything.
candidates.guardrail: organizational tooling only; no financial/tax/legal advice; never tells the user which clients to keep, chase, or drop
candidates.generated_by: autonomous factory loop 2026-07-19 (all prior candidates already BUILT)

candidates.name: Effective Hourly Rate Report
candidates.what_it_is: Upload a time-tracking CSV (Toggl/Harvest/Clockify-style export) -> what the tracked hours actually earned: per-client hours and share, billable vs non-billable split, observed revenue, effective rate per covered hour AND blended rate across all tracked hours (with the coverage share disclosed), monthly and weekday series, median/longest sessions, disclosed spelling merges. 5-sheet XLSX + one-page PDF. Organizational tooling only.
candidates.buyer: Freelancers and consultants who track time and want to see what their hours arithmetically earned, without connecting anything.
candidates.guardrail: organizational tooling only; no financial/tax/legal advice; never tells the user what to charge, never judges a rate, no market comparison
candidates.generated_by: autonomous factory loop 2026-07-20 (all prior candidates already BUILT)
